name: Mirror
description: Real-time behavioral simulation engine for smart glasses. Predicts consequences, tracks patterns, enables replay, trains identity.

permissions.microphone: Voice input for real-time conversation analysis and behavioral event detection.
permissions.display: Display whisper insights, archetype alignment, and graph data on the glasses HUD.

ai_declaration.governance: 10 immutable invariants. Behavioral model grounded in OCEAN/Big Five, Gottman Four Horsemen, Social Exchange Theory, Transactional Analysis. Per-contact reputation profiles with dimension-specific exponential decay. Quiet mode auto-activates during high emotional intensity. No false precision in real-time whispers. No judgment framing. Debrief always optional.
